benefits.visibility_desc: Your matches and profile are featured prominently.
benefits.badge_desc: Display an exclusive Gold badge on your profile.
benefits.priority_desc: Get featured at the top of search results.
benefits.stats_desc: Track your performance and career growth.

screen.title: Premium Pass
screen.unlockSubtitle: Enjoy exclusive benefits to organize your matches and gain visibility.
screen.progressTextActivity: Only {{count}} activity points to unlock 7 days of Premium.

slide1.title: ⚽ Find players around you
slide1.desc: Create or join matches easily in your city.

slide2.title: 🏆 Build your reputation
slide2.desc: Earn badges, XP and become a recognized organizer.

slide3.title: 💬 Chat and play together
slide3.desc: Connect with the football community in your region.

settings.title: Settings
settings.shareMessage: Check out Dokuz On, the app to organize your football matches! Download it here: https://rakibim.app
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.irreversible: This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted.
settings.passwordResetSent: A reset link will be sent to:
settings.notAvailable: This feature will be available after publication.

about.title: About
about.description: Dokuz On is a mobile application that helps amateur football players find matches, create announcements, chat with other players, and organize sports meetings more easily.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Dokuz On. By using this application, you agree to the following terms:
terms.content1: Users agree to use the application honestly and responsibly.
terms.content2: Respect between users is mandatory. Any abusive behavior, harassment or inappropriate content will result in immediate ban.
terms.content3: The application helps organize matches but is not responsible for incidents that may occur during physical encounters. Play safely.
terms.content4: Users are responsible for the information they share. The application may display ads via AdMob to remain free.
terms.footer: Thank you for being part of the Dokuz On community!

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.desc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.successDesc: If the address exists, a code has been sent. Check your spam.
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: No account exists with this email.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.desc: Choose a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
